text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm going to be number one! I'll be number one in both placing and popularity!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's the kind of Umamusume you're going to
see today at this year's Arima Kinen! I'm off to the
paddock!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet's already heading to the paddock. She's
really determined...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I can see it in her. But as for me...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I dunno how to put it. It's kinda like...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: The shape of a dream. Or somethin' like that.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you really think I'm okay the way I
am?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Goin' up against Scarlet like this is super fun.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I give it my all in training, raisin' my speed and
stamina—everything! All so I can beat her!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I haven't slacked on anything, I'm pretty sure
about that. But...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Is my way of life really cool? Is this really what I've been workin' for?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
As things are now, I'm nothin' but a star
Umamusume. I mean, that's great and all, but isn't
there something more I can be doing?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's different for Scarlet. That's what she's workin'
for. But...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'm different? At least, that's what I've
been thinkin'...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to become the coolest version of herself,
Vodka has jumped straight into the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that being weak is lame. But I'm not sure
if being cool is as simple as just being strong.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What do you think?
choice_data_list: Let's think about it after the Arima Kinen.
Let's think about it after the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Afterwards, huh? Yeah, I guess you're right...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There's no point dwellin' on it right before the
year's biggest race.
choice_data_list:
Not to mention that dwelling on it would be
lame.

Not to mention that dwelling on it would be
lame.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're not wrong about that! This race is
the climax of the whole year after all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
For better or worse, I'm gonna give it my all! I'm
not leavin' with any regrets!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right. Here I go. I'm sure I'll come back with my
answer!
